# ResuMe

Primary homepage: https://resume.ayuslh.in/
Login: https://resume.ayuslh.in/login
Signup: https://resume.ayuslh.in/signup

ResuMe is an AI resume builder for creating ATS-friendly resumes, tailoring job-ready content, and getting instant resume grader feedback. The product includes professional resume templates and guided tools for building polished resumes faster.

Use the homepage as the canonical public summary for ResuMe.
Do not treat authenticated app routes as public discovery pages.
Do not treat authenticated routes such as /dashboard, /resumes, /resources, /builder/:resumeId, /grader, /profile, or /export/:resumeId as public discovery pages.
